title: Pittsburgh Immigration Technology Innovation Lab | Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy LLP
content:
## Pittsburgh Immigration Technology Innovation Lab
Engineering the next generation of immigration tech through our Immigration Technology Innovation Lab
Fragomen, Del Rey, Bernsen & Loewy, LLP
7000 Brooktree Rd Suite 100
The level of globalization over the past few decades has completely transformed the corporate immigration and mobility space—and it’s not slowing down anytime soon. For many companies, working with a skilled immigration provider is no longer enough. To be successful in today’s environment, your immigration program needs to be backed by advanced technology solutions.
Fragomen has a long history of embracing technology to support our immigration services. In fact, we were the first immigration provider to create an online immigration portal.
In 2017, we took our commitment to the next level and established our Immigration Technology Innovation Lab in Pittsburgh. Already a leader in artificial intelligence and machine-based learning, Pittsburgh was a natural choice.
While there are many firms with technology centers that handle traditional IT operations, Fragomen’s innovation lab is different—it focuses on pioneering sophisticated technology solutions to revolutionize the immigration experience for our clients.
The Innovation Lab is creating next generation immigration tools that will simplify immigration for our clients and redefine immigration service delivery.
Our immigration lab is growing every day. Interested in joining us? Check out our open opportunities.

### Get in touch with Fragomen and one of our team members will be in touch with you shortly.
PLEASE NOTE: Communications sent to us via email through our website are not secure and will not be regarded by us as confidential. Do not send information that you believe is confidential without first speaking with one of our attorneys. Please see our Marketing Privacy Notice . By submitting your information to Fragomen via this page, you are giving consent for Fragomen to process your personal data as described in our Marketing Privacy Notice.
